title: 7 Natural Remedies for Older Adults Experiencing Restless Leg Syndrome
description: Avena sativa teas are made from the dried stigmas of the oat plant and have been traditionally used to help with restless leg syndrome (RLS). The teas contain a type of fiber called beta-glucan and a compound called avenanthramides, which are thought to be responsible for their therapeutic effects. These compounds work by relaxing the muscles and reducing inflammation in the legs, which can help to alleviate RLS symptoms such as twitching, cramping, and restlessness. To try Avena sativ...
